brand_dna.category: Non-toxic nursery furniture, solid wood bedroom furniture, and organic mattresses for health-conscious families.
brand_dna.core_belief: Being green is as much a matter of family health as the downstream effects to the environment - safer materials protect children first.
proof_points: Handcrafted in the USA from real solid wood, made without MDF, plywood, veneers, or particleboard
GREENGUARD Gold Certified hardwood furniture, cribs and beds, tested for over 10,000 chemicals and 350+ VOCs
Mattresses made in California from all organic materials, including GOLS certified organic latex sourced from Sri Lanka
Pillows made with a 100% natural latex core covered with a GOTS certified organic cotton cover
brand_dna.positioning: Premium, health-first, and craft-driven - the clean-materials alternative to mass-market engineered-wood furniture.

voice_pillars.name: Health-First
voice_pillars.desc: They lead with family safety and cleaner materials over style or price.
voice_pillars.quote: A Cleaner Home Starts With Better Materials

voice_pillars.name: Craft-Proud
voice_pillars.desc: They emphasize handmade, solid-wood construction and lasting quality.
voice_pillars.quote: Handcrafted in the USA from real solid wood

voice_pillars.name: Transparent About Materials
voice_pillars.desc: They name exactly what is and is not in their products so buyers can trust the claim.
voice_pillars.quote: made without MDF, plywood, veneers, or particleboard

voice_pillars.name: Family-Rooted
voice_pillars.desc: They speak from personal experience as parents motivated by their own family's health.
voice_pillars.quote: Green Cradle was born out of necessity.

phrases: A Cleaner Home Starts With Better Materials
made without MDF, plywood, veneers, or particleboard
comfort they can feel good about
one of our most comfortable pillows available

icp: Health-conscious parents and homeowners who want durable, non-toxic furniture and organic mattresses for their family and will pay premium prices for certified clean materials and craftsmanship.

personas.name: New Nursery Parent
personas.description: Expecting or new parents building a safe nursery who are moved by non-toxic materials and certified organic cribs and mattresses for baby.

personas.name: Clean-Living Homeowner
personas.description: Adult buyer furnishing a bedroom who wants solid wood over engineered wood and responds to low-VOC, GREENGUARD Gold proof.

personas.name: Health-Driven Convert
personas.description: A shopper who turned to cleaner products after a family health issue and is moved by the brand's own origin story and material transparency.

products_ladder.title: Live Edge Table Desk 80 inch x 45" inch Walnut With Glass Top

offers: Free curbside delivery on all orders in the continental USA
Optional White Glove Delivery upgrade (in-room setup and packaging disposal) for an additional charge
Clearance Sale up to 70% off select items
Note: all merchandise is non-returnable and final sale; returns only by exception with a return authorization number

allowed.claim: Handcrafted in the USA from real solid wood, made without MDF, plywood, veneers, or particleboard.
GREENGUARD Gold Certified furniture tested for over 10,000 chemicals and 350+ VOCs.
Organic mattresses made in California from all organic materials.
Crib mattress made with a 100% GOLS certified organic latex core sourced from Sri Lanka.
Pillows made with a 100% natural latex core covered with a GOTS certified organic cotton cover.
Free curbside delivery on all orders in the continental USA.

banned.claim: The best or #1 non-toxic furniture in the world.
banned.why: FTC - unqualified superlative that cannot be substantiated.
FTC Green Guides - unqualified/absolute safety claim not supported by the site's own certification language.

banned.claim: Guaranteed to prevent allergies or health issues in your child.
banned.why: FTC - guaranteed health outcome that cannot be proven.

banned.claim: Only X left - order now before it's gone (invented scarcity).
banned.why: FTC - fake urgency not backed by real inventory data.

banned.claim: Rated 5 stars by thousands of parents.
banned.why: FTC - invented review counts; no verified review volume provided.
Contradicts stated policy: all merchandise is non-returnable and final sale.
